title: Point Reyes Light — September 28, 2000 (Page 21)
author: Point Reyes Light Staff
card_summary: A single page from the Point Reyes Light, a weekly community newspaper serving Point Reyes Station, California, dated September 28, 2000, Page 21. This posthumous issue may contain coverage related to PKD's literary legacy, film adaptations of his work, or community items connected to his former residence in the Point Reyes area.
page_summary:
A scanned newspaper page from the Point Reyes Light (Point Reyes Station, California), dated Thursday, September 28, 2000, page 21. The clipping was sourced from Newspapers.com and downloaded on April 4, 2025. The PDF text layer contains only source metadata with no recoverable article text.

By 2000, Dick's literary reputation had been firmly established, with his works entering the Library of America series and academic scholarship flourishing. This clipping from Dick's former Marin County community may document local cultural coverage related to his growing canonical status. The specific content remains to be determined through examination of the scanned image.
